sentences.arabic: تُوَاجِهُ الأَرْضُ تَغَيُّرَاتٍ مُنَاخِيَّةً خَطِيرَةً بِسَبَبِ التَّلَوُّثِ.
sentences.translation: Zemlja se suočava s opasnim klimatskim promjenama zbog zagađenja.
sentences.translationEn: Earth faces dangerous climate changes due to pollution.

sentences.arabic: تَرْتَفِعُ دَرَجَاتُ الحَرَارَةِ فِي جَمِيعِ أَنْحَاءِ العَالَمِ بِاسْتِمْرَارٍ.
sentences.translationEn: Temperatures around the world are constantly rising.

sentences.arabic: بَدَأَتِ الثُّلُوجُ فِي القُطْبَيْنِ تَنْصَهِرُ بِسُرْعَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Led na polovima počeo se topiti velikom brzinom.
sentences.translationEn: Ice at the poles has begun to melt very quickly.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الدُّوَلِ أَنْ تَعْمَلَ مَعًا لِحِمَايَةِ الغَابَاتِ وَالبِحَارِ.
sentences.translation: Države moraju raditi zajedno kako bi zaštitile šume i mora.
sentences.translationEn: Countries must work together to protect forests and seas.

sentences.arabic: يُمْكِنُنَا تَقْلِيلُ هَذِهِ المَشَاكِلِ عَنْ طَرِيقِ اسْتِخْدَامِ الطَّاقَةِ النَّظِيفَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ove probleme možemo smanjiti korištenjem čiste energije.
sentences.translationEn: We can reduce these problems by using clean energy.
